allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3852 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Remove-Item -Path "C:\\Users\\jsitz\\Projects\\nd-discord-gemini-bot\\data\\nd-bot-instance.lock" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; cd "C:\\Users\\jsitz\\Projects\\nd-discord-gemini-bot"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "bun" -ArgumentList "run", "src/bot.ts" -RedirectStandardOutput "bot-out.log" -RedirectStandardError "bot-err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Get-Content "bot-err.log" -Tail 5; Write-Host "---"; Get-Content "bot-out.log" | Select-String "Logged in|error|Error" -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 5)
Bash(sleep 5 && tail -20 /tmp/bot-restart.log 2>/dev/null || echo "Log not ready yet")
